intent: 2-STOREY 2BR / 2 bath wide rear-sideways-stair smoke test on the canonical 11x9 lot, no carport. 7x5 envelope per floor (35 m² footprint, 70 m² gross) — in the 65-80 m² 2BR/2-bath band, on a wide-frontage lot. Exercises the catalog's first HORIZONTAL stair run (the solver's run-axis decision picks the sideways orientation on this shell), the horizontal branch of the stair_boarding/stair_arrival end constraints, the full-width front great room, both bedrooms street-facing with the hall as a bounded center notch (hallway max_area cap), and bath2 stacked directly over bath1.
must_haves: sideways stair along the rear band
full-width great room across the front
dining counter between great room and kitchen
upper T&B stacked over the ground-floor T&B
